2603.16489.title: Unlearning for One-Step Generative Models via Unbalanced Optimal Transport
2603.16489.paper_summary: Recent advances in one-step generative frameworks, such as flow map models, have significantly improved the efficiency of image generation by learning direct noise-to-data mappings in a single forward pass. However, machine unlearning for ensuring the safety of these powerful generators remains entirely unexplored. Existing diffusion unlearning methods are inherently incompatible with these one-step models, as they rely on a multi-step iterative denoising process. In this work, we propose UOT-Unlearn, a novel plug-and-play class unlearning framework for one-step generative models based on the Unbalanced Optimal Transport (UOT). Our method formulates unlearning as a principled trade-off between a forget cost, which suppresses the target class, and an $f$-divergence penalty, which preserves overall generation fidelity via relaxed marginal constraints. By leveraging UOT, our method enables the probability mass of the forgotten class to be smoothly redistributed to the remaining classes, rather than collapsing into low-quality or noise-like samples. Experimental results on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet-256 demonstrate that our framework achieves superior unlearning success (PUL) and retention quality (u-FID), significantly outperforming baselines.
2603.16489.paper_summary_zh: 最近在單步生成框架方面的進展，例如流圖模型，已顯著提高了圖像生成的效率，通過在單次前向傳遞中學習直接的噪聲到數據的映射。然而，為了確保這些強大生成器的安全性，機器遺忘的研究仍然完全未被探索。現有的擴散遺忘方法與這些單步模型本質上不相容，因為它們依賴於多步迭代去噪過程。在這項工作中，我們提出了 UOT-Unlearn，一種基於不平衡最優傳輸（UOT）的新型即插即用類別遺忘框架，專為單步生成模型設計。我們的方法將遺忘公式化為一種原則性的權衡，這種權衡在抑制目標類別的遺忘成本與通過放鬆邊際約束保持整體生成保真度的 $f$-發散懲罰之間進行。通過利用 UOT，我們的方法使被遺忘類別的概率質量能夠平滑地重新分配到其餘類別，而不是崩潰成低質量或噪聲樣本。在 CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet-256 上的實驗結果表明，我們的框架在遺忘成功率（PUL）和保留質量（u-FID）方面達到了優越的表現，顯著超越了基準。
2603.16489.author: Hyundo Choi et.al.
2603.16489.authors: Hyundo Choi, Junhyeong An, Jinseong Park, Jaewoong Choi
